input.content:
from collections import OrderedDict

class LRUCache:
    """
    Implements a Least Recently Used Cache with fixed capacity.
    """
    def __init__(self, capacity: int):
        # Using OrderedDict to maintain insertion order (which we treat as usage order)
        self.cache = OrderedDict()
        self.capacity = capacity

    def get(self, key: int) -> int:
        if key not in self.cache:
            return -1
        
        # Move accessed item to the end (Most Recently Used)
        value = self.cache[key]
        self.cache.move_to_end(key)
        return value

    def put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None:
        if key in self.cache:
            # Key exists: Update value and move to end (MRU)
            self.cache[key] = value
            self.cache.move_to_end(key)
        else:
            if len(self.cache) >= self.capacity:
                # Cache full: Evict the first item (Least Recently Used)
                # popitem(last=False) removes and returns the (key, value) pair from the beginning
                self.cache.popitem(last=False)

            # Insert new item (it automatically goes to the end/MRU position)
            self.cache[key] = value

from collections import OrderedDict

class LRUCache:
    """
    Implements a Least Recently Used Cache with fixed capacity.
    """
    def __init__(self, capacity: int):
        # Using OrderedDict to maintain insertion order (which we treat as usage order)
        self.cache = OrderedDict()
        self.capacity = capacity

    def get(self, key: int) -> int:
        if key not in self.cache:
            return -1
        
        # Move accessed item to the end (Most Recently Used)
        value = self.cache[key]
        self.cache.move_to_end(key)
        return value

    def put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None:
        if key in self.cache:
            # Key exists: Update value and move to end (MRU)
            self.cache[key] = value
            self.cache.move_to_end(key)
        else:
            if len(self.cache) >= self.capacity:
                # Cache full: Evict the first item (Least Recently Used)
                # popitem(last=False) removes and returns the (key, value) pair from the beginning
                self.cache.popitem(last=False)

            # Insert new item (it automatically goes to the end/MRU position)
            self.cache[key] = value

from collections import OrderedDict

    """
    Implements a Least Recently Used Cache with fixed capacity.

    def __init__(self, capacity: int):
        # Using OrderedDict to maintain insertion order (which we treat as usage order)
        self.cache = OrderedDict()
        self.capacity = capacity

    def get(self, key: int) -> int:
        if key not in self.cache:
            return -1
        
        # Move accessed item to the end (Most Recently Used)
        value = self.cache[key]
        self.cache.move_to_end(key)
        return value

    def put(self, key: int, value: int) -> None:
        if key in self.cache:
            # Key exists: Update value and move to end (MRU)
            self.cache[key] = value
            self.cache.move_to_end(key)
        else:
            if len(self.cache) >= self.capacity:
                # Cache full: Evict the first item (Least Recently Used)
                # popitem(last=False) removes and returns the (key, value) pair from the beginning
                self.cache.popitem(last=False)

            self.cache[key] = value
